title: Tamil Nadu politics LIVE: AIADMK reacts sharply to rebel MLAs, AMMK expels party's lone legislator
description: Ahead of the crucial floor test where TVK-led government is set to prove its majority in the Legislative Assembly and amid a split in AIADMK, AMMK's lone MLA S. Kamaraj announced that he would support the government, during his maiden speech in the Assembly.
